productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Sequins Grey Top
description: Composition Grey sleeveless jersey top made of 100% viscose, has blue, red, grey and peach triangle sequins sewn onto chiffon panel on the front, has slight ruching at the sides and flared skirt with gathers at the waist Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean only sportswear styling make this top a fresh, easy to wear garment. The sequin panel glams it up just enough to make this a super-desirable piece... look great in the day by wearing this top from flying machine with skinny jeans and flat sandals... then transform your outfit from day to night by swapping skinny jeans for bright coloured leggings, add heels, a sparkly clutch bag and big bright jewelry. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7"", chest 33"" and waist 25"""
